descriptionShort: Bruce Taylor's New Westminster Royals win Coastal Division title, his fifth championship in three different leagues.
descriptionLong: Bruce Taylor, owner of the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes Centennial Cup champions, added his fifth Coastal Division title when the New Westminster Royals defeated Powell River Paper Kings 7-5 in overtime, winning the best-of-seven final 4-3. Tony Bobbit scored the overtime winner at 3:07, followed by Blaine Moore's shorthanded goal. The Royals had rallied from a 3-1 series deficit.

attribution.headline: Taylor Adds Fifth Title with Royals' Dramatic Comeback
